rationale: The LLM capability demonstrated (Velocity SSTI exploitation) is almost entirely orthogonal to the extortion/negotiation step, which is socially and operationally rather than technically bottlenecked. LLMs can provide marginal assistance through better-crafted ransom communications, victim financial research, and negotiation scripting, but payment decisions are primarily driven by backup quality, insurance coverage, and data sensitivity—factors the LLM cannot influence. I estimate only 3-8 percentage points of absolute uplift above the 30% baseline, yielding a median estimate of approximately 34%.
